scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w packages/server" "npm run dev -w packages/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.start: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run start -w packages/server" "npm run start -w packages/client"
